TextRun.Text: 3. find out when you are most
by both mental challenges and active effort
effort and cooperation, we can overcome difficulties and create something meaningful.

RichText.Text: 1. spend a fair amount of time taking notes recognize high and low music notes better 2. tell the difference in sound quality 3. find out when you are most productive 4. find it more beneficial to study at night be of benefit=beneficial 5. prove to be of great value 6. discomfort: a hidden source of resilience comfort n./v. uncomfortable adj. misfortune n. unfortunate adj. 7. GPS:the unseen cost of convenience 8. Smartphones: blocks to human progress 9. a process fuled by both mental challenges and active effort 10. It was then that I realized through effort and cooperation, we can overcome difficulties and create something meaningful.

TextRun.Text: 9. 一个由思维挑战和积极努力
在那时我意识到，通过努力
与合作，我们可以克服困难并创造

RichText.Text: 1. 花相当多的时间做笔记 更好地识别高低音音符 2. 分辨音质的差异 3. 找出你效率最高的时段 4. 发现晚上学习更有益的 有益的（= beneficial） 5. 证明极具价值的 6. 不适：韧性的隐秘源泉 舒适（n./vt）/ 不舒服的 （adj.） 不幸（n.）/ 不幸的（adj.） 7. GPS：便利背后的隐性代价 8. 智能手机：人类进步的阻碍 9. 一个由思维挑战和积极努力 共同刺激/促进的过程 10. 正是在那时我意识到，通过努力 与合作，我们可以克服困难并创造 出有意义的东西。
